text:
Created attachment 151515
fix the carp issue on hyper-v

(In reply to Xin LI from comment #6)
Thanks for the review. You are right, arp_ifinit is already done in ether_ioctl fucntion in the next invocation. I have removed that line of code and CARP works well. A new patch has been uploaded. Thanks.
